_meta.description: Board game expansion data for all games with notable expansions

catan.name: Catan: Seafarers
catan.description: Explore islands, build ships, and discover gold rivers.

catan.name: Catan: Cities & Knights
catan.description: Defend Catan from barbarians and develop cities with commodities.

catan.name: Catan: Traders & Barbarians
catan.description: Five scenario variants including rivers, caravans, and barbarian attacks.

catan.name: Catan: 5-6 Player Extension
catan.description: Adds components to play with up to 6 players.

wingspan.name: Wingspan: European Expansion
wingspan.description: 81 European birds with new end-of-round goals and bonus cards.

wingspan.name: Wingspan: Oceania Expansion
wingspan.description: 95 birds from Australia and New Zealand plus new player mats and food.

wingspan.name: Wingspan: Asia Expansion
wingspan.description: Duet mode for 2 players plus 90+ Asian birds.

ticket-to-ride.name: Ticket to Ride: Europe
ticket-to-ride.description: New map with tunnels, ferries, and stations across Europe.

ticket-to-ride.name: Ticket to Ride: Nordic Countries
ticket-to-ride.description: Standalone 2-3 player game set in Scandinavia.

ticket-to-ride.name: Ticket to Ride: 1910
ticket-to-ride.description: New destination tickets and full-size cards for the USA map.

pandemic.name: Pandemic: On the Brink
pandemic.description: Three new challenge modules: Virulent Strain, Mutation, and Bio-Terrorist.

pandemic.name: Pandemic: In the Lab
pandemic.description: New lab challenge adds a board for curing diseases.

pandemic.name: Pandemic: State of Emergency
pandemic.description: Hinterlands, Superbug, and Emergency Events challenge modules.

terraforming-mars.name: Terraforming Mars: Hellas & Elysium
terraforming-mars.description: Two new maps with different milestones and awards.

terraforming-mars.name: Terraforming Mars: Prelude
terraforming-mars.description: Fast-start cards that give your corporation a head start.

terraforming-mars.name: Terraforming Mars: Colonies
terraforming-mars.description: Colonize moons of Jupiter and Saturn for new resources.

terraforming-mars.name: Terraforming Mars: Turmoil
terraforming-mars.description: Political parties and global events affect the terraforming process.

root.name: Root: The Riverfolk Expansion
root.description: Adds the Riverfolk Company and Lizard Cult factions.

root.name: Root: The Underworld Expansion
root.description: Adds the Underground Duchy and Corvid Conspiracy plus 2 new maps.

root.name: Root: The Marauder Expansion
root.description: Lord of the Hundreds and Keepers in Iron factions plus hirelings.

dominion.name: Dominion: Intrigue
dominion.description: Choice-based action cards and new victory cards.

dominion.name: Dominion: Seaside
dominion.description: Duration cards that affect your next turn.

dominion.name: Dominion: Prosperity
dominion.description: Platinum and Colony cards for higher-value games.

spirit-island.name: Spirit Island: Branch & Claw
spirit-island.description: New spirits, event cards, and tokens for beasts and disease.

spirit-island.name: Spirit Island: Jagged Earth
spirit-island.description: 10 new spirits, new adversaries, and scenarios.

7-wonders.name: 7 Wonders: Cities
7-wonders.description: Adds diplomacy, espionage, and city cards for team play up to 8.

7-wonders.name: 7 Wonders: Leaders
7-wonders.description: Leader cards drafted before each age provide unique bonuses.

7-wonders.name: 7 Wonders: Armada
7-wonders.description: Naval boards with four fleets that advance during the game.

carcassonne.name: Carcassonne: Inns & Cathedrals
carcassonne.description: Double-scoring inns on lakes and cathedral tiles, plus a big meeple.

carcassonne.name: Carcassonne: Traders & Builders
carcassonne.description: Trade goods, builder for double turns, and a pig for farm scoring.

scythe.name: Scythe: Invaders from Afar
scythe.description: Two new factions — Togawa Shogunate and Albion — for up to 7 players.

scythe.name: Scythe: The Wind Gambit
scythe.description: Airship modules and resolution tiles that change endgame scoring.

scythe.name: Scythe: The Rise of Fenris
scythe.description: 8-episode campaign with persistent changes and new mechanics.

everdell.name: Everdell: Pearlbrook
everdell.description: River board with frog ambassador, adornment cards, and wonders.

everdell.name: Everdell: Spirecrest
everdell.description: Big critters and weather cards add new strategic depth.

everdell.name: Everdell: Bellfaire
everdell.description: 5-6 player support, player powers, and market board.

agricola.name: Agricola: Farmers of the Moor
agricola.description: Heating requirements, horses, and forest/moor tiles.

agricola.name: Agricola: Artifex Deck
agricola.description: 120 new occupation and minor improvement cards.

azul.name: Azul: Stained Glass of Sintra
azul.description: Translucent tiles on a double-sided player board with shifting columns.

azul.name: Azul: Summer Pavilion
azul.description: Star-shaped pattern building with wild tiles and bonus rounds.

viticulture.name: Viticulture: Tuscany Essential Edition
viticulture.description: Extended board with four seasons, special workers, and structures.

viticulture.name: Viticulture: Visit from the Rhine Valley
viticulture.description: 80 new visitor cards for more variety.

clank.name: Clank!: Sunken Treasures
clank.description: Underwater-themed board with new market items and flood mechanics.

clank.name: Clank!: The Mummy's Curse
clank.description: Pyramid dungeon with mummy that chases players.

lords-of-waterdeep.name: Lords of Waterdeep: Scoundrels of Skullport
lords-of-waterdeep.description: Two modules — Undermountain and Skullport — with corruption mechanic.

king-of-tokyo.name: King of Tokyo: Power Up!
king-of-tokyo.description: Evolution cards give each monster unique abilities.

king-of-tokyo.name: King of Tokyo: Halloween
king-of-tokyo.description: Two new monsters and costume cards.

cosmic-encounter.name: Cosmic Encounter: Cosmic Incursion
cosmic-encounter.description: 20 new aliens, reward deck, and 6th player support.

cosmic-encounter.name: Cosmic Encounter: Cosmic Conflict
cosmic-encounter.description: 20 more aliens, hazard deck, and 7th player.

great-western-trail.name: Great Western Trail: Rails to the North
great-western-trail.description: Northern branch with new station tiles and branchlets.

brass-birmingham.name: Brass: Lancashire
brass-birmingham.description: The original Brass game set in Lancashire with cotton and ports.

dead-of-winter.name: Dead of Winter: The Long Night
dead-of-winter.description: Standalone expansion with Raxxon, bandits, and unruly survivors.

betrayal-at-house-on-the-hill.name: Betrayal at House on the Hill: Widow's Walk
betrayal-at-house-on-the-hill.description: 50 brand new haunts, new rooms, and an entirely new floor — the roof.

mysterium.name: Mysterium: Hidden Signs
mysterium.description: 42 new vision cards, 6 characters, 6 locations, and 6 objects.

mysterium.name: Mysterium: Secrets & Lies
mysterium.description: New story cards mechanic and 6 new suspects/locations/objects.

quacks-of-quedlinburg.name: The Quacks of Quedlinburg: The Herb Witches
quacks-of-quedlinburg.description: New ingredient books, locoweed, and 5th player support.

quacks-of-quedlinburg.name: The Quacks of Quedlinburg: The Alchemists

concordia.name: Concordia: Salsa
concordia.description: Salt as a universal resource plus two new maps (Byzantium & Hispania).

concordia.name: Concordia: Venus
concordia.description: Team variant for 4-6 players and new maps.
